prompt: A surreal photorealistic conceptual landscape showing a massive stepped structure resembling a bar chart rising out of a vast, dusty refugee camp. The steps evolve architecturally through human history: starting as ancient stone ruins with carvings, then classical stone facades, older brick buildings, and finally culminating in a massive, towering modern concrete brutalist high-rise. Exhausted families with meager belongings climb the steps. The modern concrete tower is disproportionately taller than the rest, dominating the skyline, with a glowing white medical tent on its roof. Cinematic lighting, documentary photojournalism style, muted earth tones, epic scale, highly detailed, no text, no labels.
dataset_name: UNHCR Global Trends in Forced Displacement
insight: While human displacement has always existed throughout history, the sheer volume of forced displacement in the modern era has escalated into an unprecedented, towering crisis.
